purpose: Headless verification harness for the Phase 6 Bundle A4 Override Track feature. Drives Playwright + Chromium against a localhost static server (default http://localhost:8765) and runs five suites in sequence: (1) launcherUiTests — DOM render of #overrideTrack, buttons, audio picker accept attribute, default-hidden status/error/WE pills; (2) wallpaperEngineModeTests — under ?we=1, asserts .disabled class on #overrideTrack, #weDisabled pill visible, both buttons HTML-disabled; (3) idbRoundTripTests — drives the file picker with the bundled Still Alive.ogg via setInputFiles, asserts the probe→IDB.put→status-refresh pipeline produces a visible '#audioStatus' line with filename + ~2:53 duration, then asserts the IDB record exists, then clicks RESET and asserts the record is gone + status hidden; (4) variantBlobOverrideTests — for each of portal/, portal2/, portal2/portal1style/, seeds IDB with a deliberately-different bundled audio file (fetched same-origin and put as a blob), reloads the variant, then asserts cake.player.src is a blob: URL, cake.creditsMaxTime is updated via loadedmetadata (differs from the bundle default AND lands within 10 s of the source nominal length), and where applicable cake.audioStartDelay is zeroed (portal/) or preserved (portal2/portal1style/); (5) variantNoOverrideRegressionTests — without IDB seed, asserts each variant falls back to the bundled audio file with unchanged creditsMaxTime + default audioStartDelay. Exit code = number of failed assertions; 0 on green.
calls_out_to: page.goto / reload / evaluate / setInputFiles / click / locator / waitForFunction
fetch (preflight + same-origin audio blob seeding inside page.evaluate)
invariants: BASE env var overrides the default http://localhost:8765; preflight() fails loud with exit 2 if the static server is not reachable.
Every scenario uses a fresh browser context (browser.newContext()) so IndexedDB state is isolated across tests — without this, the seeded blob in one test would leak into the next.

seedIdbWithFetch fetches an audio file same-origin from the running localhost server, packages it as a Blob, and stores it under aperture/audio/customAudio. The fetch happens inside page.evaluate so the resulting blob is bound to the page's origin (otherwise IndexedDB writes from the test would fail with cross-origin issues).

Per-variant override tests deliberately swap audio sources (portal/ gets Want You Gone.mp3, portal2/ and portal2/portal1style/ get Still Alive.ogg) so the creditsMaxTime override is clearly distinguishable from the variant's hardcoded default — same-source would silently pass even if the override never fired.

The creditsMaxTime tolerance is ±10 s of the nominal source duration because VBR MP3 and Vorbis OGG decoded durations diverge several seconds from the labeled length. The assertion ALSO requires maxTime !== bundleDefault so a stuck-at-default regression cannot pass by coincidence.
WaitForFunction is used for the RESET state-change because waitForSelector with the default visibility check cannot match a display:none element — the .hidden class makes the element non-visible.

variantNoOverrideRegressionTests guards against a regression where applyCustomAudio's fallback path (no IDB record present) stops calling cake.initMusicPlayer — without this suite, the no-override case would only be implicitly covered by test/a3-verify.js's scroll smoke.
gotchas: Requires `npm install` inside test/ to pull playwright + `npx playwright install chromium` for the headless-shell binary (same as A3). test/node_modules and test/package-lock.json are gitignored.
page.setInputFiles uses an absolute file system path (REPO_ROOT is computed via path.resolve(__dirname, '..') so this is robust to cwd).

The idbRoundTripTests duration assertion uses a regex /\b2:5[0-9]\b/ to match 2:50–2:59 — Still Alive.ogg's actual decoded duration is 2:56 not the 2:53 the original Portal credits assume. Loosened to handle the ~3 s drift.

page.waitForFunction(() => window.cake.audioReady) waits up to 20 s for canplaythrough on the override audio. Blob URLs load from memory so this is usually ~1 s, but a long custom audio file (the test uses ~3 min files) takes longer to buffer enough for canplaythrough.

audioStartDelayDefault is null for portal2/ because portal2/cake.js doesn't have an audioStartDelay field (it plays immediately in cake.init). The assertion is skipped for that variant via the !== null guard.

The chromium flags --autoplay-policy=no-user-gesture-required and --mute-audio mirror test/a3-verify.js so headless audio doesn't blare during local runs and canplaythrough is reachable without a user gesture.
If you add an audio file to either portal/ or portal2/ with a different actual duration than the marketing length, update v.swapDurationSec — the ±10 s tolerance is generous but not infinite.

key_functions.name: assert
key_functions.summary: Increments pass/fail counters, prints status with optional detail, and pushes failures into a list reported at the end.

key_functions.name: preflight
key_functions.summary: Fetches /launcher/index.html before launching the browser; bails out with exit 2 if the static server isn't reachable.

key_functions.name: seedIdbWithFetch
key_functions.summary: Inside page.evaluate, fetches the named audio path same-origin, wraps the response in a Blob, opens IndexedDB 'aperture' v1, and puts { blob, filename, durationSec } under key 'customAudio'.

key_functions.name: launcherUiTests
key_functions.summary: Asserts the OVERRIDE TRACK section + child elements render and that the audio picker has the expected accept attribute. All meta-row pills default hidden.

key_functions.name: wallpaperEngineModeTests
key_functions.summary: Loads /launcher/?we=1, asserts the section gets the .disabled class, the WE pill becomes visible, and both buttons get the HTML disabled attribute.

key_functions.name: idbRoundTripTests
key_functions.summary: Drives setInputFiles with the bundled Still Alive.ogg, waits for the probe→IDB.put→status-refresh pipeline to complete, asserts the status text + IDB record, then clicks RESET and asserts the IDB record is deleted + status hidden.

key_functions.name: variantBlobOverrideTests
key_functions.summary: For each variant, seeds IDB with a deliberately-different audio file and asserts cake.player.src is a blob URL, cake.creditsMaxTime is overridden via loadedmetadata, and cake.audioStartDelay is zeroed where applicable (portal/) or preserved (portal2/portal1style/).

key_functions.name: variantNoOverrideRegressionTests
key_functions.summary: For each variant with NO IDB seed, asserts the bundled audio loads with unchanged creditsMaxTime and default audioStartDelay — guards the applyCustomAudio fallback path.
